name: ivista
description: CLI-first controls for iOS Simulator and iPhone/iPad through WDA.

interface.shortDescription: Operate iOS Simulator and devices from Codex.
interface.longDescription: iVista teaches Codex how to install and use the ivista CLI for discovering iOS Simulators, booting them, starting WebDriverAgent with automatic cache management, and performing WDA-backed screenshots, source reads, taps, text input, swipes, and app launch or terminate actions.
defaultPrompt: Use iVista to inspect my iOS Simulator.
Start WDA on the booted Simulator.
Take a screenshot and tell me what to tap next.
